build.buildCommand: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.30.3 --activate && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm --filter web build && mkdir -p apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/.next && rm -rf apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/.next/static apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/public && cp -R apps/web/.next/static apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/.next/static && cp -R apps/web/public apps/web/.next/standalone/apps/web/public
